case_title: ZOLBOO GANBOLD VS. MANUEL DEL JESUS OCHOA VALLE

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF OCT-03-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF OCT-03-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. PLAINTIFF ZOLBOO GANBOLD IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT MANUEL DEL JESUS OCHOA VALLE IS PRESENT AND IS ASSITED BY COURT CERTIFED INTERPERTER FOR SPANISH. JACQUELINE HANSEN, PREGRESSIVE INSUANCE AGENT, TESTIFIES ON DEFENDANT'S BEHALF. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE A. JAMES ROBERTSON; CLERK: W. TRUPEK. NOT REPORTED.(506)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-12-2019 - CONTINUED FOR SPANISH INTERPRETER FOR DEFENDANT MANUEL DEL JESUS OCHOA VALLE TO OCT-03-2019 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF ZOLBO GANBOLD IS PRESENT.
